elements.text: You had a very busy day, and were not able to get all of your tasks done. While at dinner with a friend, they brag about how they finished everything on their to-do list. Thinking about whether you can complete your work tomorrow, you feel...

elements.name: unfinished_work--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
